name: brainstorm
description: Brainstorm — knowledge-management product modeled as a desktop OS.

scripts.build: bun run build:native && bun run --filter '*' build
scripts.build:shell: bun run build:native && bun run --filter @brainstorm/shell build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:apps: fail=0; for d in apps/*/; do echo "== $d =="; (cd "$d" && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json) || fail=1; done; exit $fail
scripts.lint: biome check . && node tools/check-app-reactivity.mjs && node tools/check-control-faces.mjs && bun tools/check-css-tokens.mjs && node tools/check-app-i18n.mjs
scripts.lint:apps: node tools/check-app-reactivity.mjs && node tools/check-control-faces.mjs && bun tools/check-css-tokens.mjs && node tools/check-app-i18n.mjs
scripts.verify: bun run build:native && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:apps && bun run build:apps && bun --bun vitest run packages/shell/src/main/integration packages/shell/src/main/entities
scripts.perf:build: bun run --filter @brainstorm/shell build && bun run build:apps
scripts.perf:ci: bun run perf && bun run perf:check
scripts.soak:build: bun run --filter @brainstorm/shell build && bun run build:apps
scripts.e2e:build: bun run --filter @brainstorm/shell build && bun run build:apps
scripts.publish:catalog: bun run build:native && bun run build:apps && bun tools/publish-first-party-catalog.ts
scripts.prepackage: bun run build:native:release && bun run --filter @brainstorm/shell build && bun run build:apps
